name: make-change-that-lasts-9-simple-ways-to-break-free-from-the-habits-that-hold-you-back
description: Dr. Rangan Chatterjee's 'Make Change That Lasts' — break free from 9 hidden Reliances: experts, perfection, being liked, comfort, being right, expecting smooth sailing, the past, busyness, and getting. A practical guide to sustainable personal change through self-trust and embracing discomfort.
